rationale: Both papers center on eliciting more truthful responses in surveys where direct verification is difficult: the citing paper introduces ICRT as a new truth-telling method for sensitive behavior, while the cited paper develops and experimentally validates Bayesian Truth Serum incentives. Given this close methodological overlap and the cited work’s role as a prior truth-induction mechanism in survey measurement, this is not a clearly incidental mention and should be reviewed in full.
